title: HII Launches Virginia-Class Submarine New Jersey (SSN 796)
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., April 28, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE:HII) announced today that Virginia-class submarine New Jersey (SSN 796) was recently launched into the James River at the company's Newport News Shipbuilding division.

title: HII Announces New Vice President of Contracts and Pricing at Ingalls Shipbuilding
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., April 25, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- All-domain defense and technologies partner HII (NYSE:HII) announced today that Stephen Fitts has been promoted to vice president of contracts and pricing at its Ingalls Shipbuilding division. Fitts succeeds Eric Crooker who assumed a new role in March as vice president of infrastructure and sustainability.

title: HII Announces Kimberly Aguillard as New Media Relations Manager at Ingalls Shipbuilding
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., April 22, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- All-domain defense and technologies partner HII (NYSE:HII) announced today that Kimberly Aguillard has joined its corporate communications team as a manager of media relations. She will serve as HII's spokesperson for Ingalls Shipbuilding, a division of America's largest shipbuilder, and report to HII's corporate director of public affairs.

title: HII Announces Todd Corillo as New Media Relations Manager at Newport News Shipbuilding
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., April 22, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- All-domain defense and technologies partner HII (NYSE:HII) announced today that Todd Corillo will join its corporate communications team as a manager of media relations May 9. He will serve as HII's spokesperson for the company's Newport News Shipbuilding division and report to HII's corporate director of public affairs.

title: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding Showcases Facilities and Workforce in Demonstration of Production Capacity
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., April 22, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- All-domain defense and technologies partner HII (NYSE:HII) hosted U.S. Reps. Rob Wittman, R-Va.; Mike Gallagher, R-Wis.; and Trent Kelly, R-Miss., last week in a demonstration of immediate production capacity at Ingalls Shipbuilding, a division of America's largest shipbuilder. The lawmakers are members of the House Armed Services seapower and projection forces subcommittee, which is beginning its consideration of the National Defense Authorization Act for fiscal year 2023.

title: HII Names National Security Expert to Expand Mission-Critical Capabilities for the U.S. Military and Intelligence Community
text: MCLEAN, Va., April 18, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) announced today that Henry Choi has joined its Mission Technologies division as vice president of business development for cyber, electronic warfare (EW) and space.

title: Huntington Ingalls (HII) Wins Deal to Support DDG 51 Program
text: Huntington Ingalls (HII) is going to exercise options for the accomplishment of follow yard services for the DDG 51 Class destroyer program.

title: Destroyer Frank E. Petersen Jr. (DDG 121) Sailed Away From Ingalls Shipbuilding
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss.,, April 13, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer Frank E. Petersen Jr. (DDG 121) departed from HII's (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division on Friday. Frank E. Petersen Jr. will be commissioned next month in Charleston, South Carolina, before sailing to its homeport at Hawaii's Joint Base Pearl Harbor-Hickam.

title: Huntington Ingalls - Defense Spending And Dividends
text: Business costs are now rising at a rate not seen since 2008.

title: HII to Host First Quarter Earnings Conference Call and Webcast on May 5
text: NEWPORT NEWS, Va., April 07, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE:HII) will release its first quarter 2022 financial results on Thursday, May 5, and host an earnings conference call at 9 a.m. Eastern time the same day. The call will be webcast live on HII's website: https://www.hii.com/.

title: HII Launches National Security Cutter Calhoun (WMSL 759)
text: PASCAGOULA, Miss., April 03, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) launched the Legend-class national security cutter Calhoun (WMSL 759) on Saturday at the company's Ingalls Shipbuilding division. Launching Calhoun is the first of a series of significant milestone events in bringing the ship to life.
